hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.cs) dirname "$f" > /tmp/portal-build-pending ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; }

input=$(cat); [ "$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false')" = "true" ] && exit 0; [ -f /tmp/portal-build-pending ] || exit 0; dir=$(cat /tmp/portal-build-pending); rm -f /tmp/portal-build-pending; root=$(git -C "$dir" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || exit 0; out=$(dotnet build "$root/PortalAuth.Tests/PortalAuth.Tests.csproj" --nologo -v q 2>&1) || { printf 'BUILD GATE FAILED — the solution does not compile. Fix before finishing:\n%s\n' "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
